title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CaratLane Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CaratLane Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with CaratLane Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About CaratLane Advisory Limited:
CaratLane Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
